summary: P22 Daily Consumption Report - Frontend Testing Complete. All 12 features tested and verified. The consumption report page renders correctly with all required components: date range filter, store selector, hierarchy toggle, KPI cards, ingredient summary table, consumption details table (collapsible), by-store rollup, and drill-down functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: DailyConsumptionReport.jsx correctly implements all P22 requirements
useConsumptionReport.js hook properly handles API calls and state management
api.js getDailyConsumptionReport function correctly sends include_hierarchy flag
Negative closing stock correctly shows amber warning triangle icon (AlertTriangle)
Drill-down functionality works correctly with badge and Clear button
Consumption Details section is collapsible (collapsed by default)
Store multi-selector shows scope stores with checkboxes and type labels
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy. Data exists in DemoFranchise2 (rid=784) for May 2026.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P22 Daily Consumption Report fully tested. All features working: sidebar nav item, page rendering, filter bar, single-store empty state, multi-store data display, KPI cards, ingredient summary table with all columns, negative stock warning icons, drill-down with badge and clear, collapsible details section, by-store rollup, store multi-selector dropdown. API endpoint POST /proxy/v2/report/daily-consumption-report working correctly.

features_tested.TEST-1: PASS - Login and sidebar shows 'Consumption Report' link (data-testid='nav-consumption-report')
features_tested.TEST-2: PASS - Navigate to /reports/consumption - page renders with filter bar and initial state
features_tested.TEST-3: PASS - Click 'Generate Report' with default date range - empty state shows for single-store (master has no direct consumption)
features_tested.TEST-4: PASS - Toggle 'Include all stores' switch and click 'Generate Report' - KPI cards, ingredient summary table, and consumption details appear with data
features_tested.TEST-5: PASS - Ingredient summary table shows columns: Ingredient, Category, Opening, Consumed, Closing, Store
features_tested.TEST-6: PASS - Negative closing stock shows amber warning triangle icon (2 icons found for -500 ml and -1 kg)
features_tested.TEST-7: PASS - Click on ingredient row in summary - drill-down badge appears ('Drill-down: Cooking Oil (DemoFranchise2)') and details table filters to that ingredient (2 rows)
features_tested.TEST-8: PASS - Click 'Clear' on drill-down badge - details table shows all records again (4 rows)
features_tested.TEST-9: PASS - 'Consumption by Store' section appears in multi-store mode (shows DemoFranchise2 with 1,500 raw units)
features_tested.TEST-10: PASS - Consumption details section is collapsible (collapsed by default, expandable)
features_tested.TEST-11: PASS - Loading state shows while fetching (button shows 'Loading...')
features_tested.TEST-12: PASS - Store multi-selector dropdown shows scope stores (7 stores) with checkboxes and type labels (Central, Master, Outlet)
